data.title: Analysts increase forecasts for Illumina after Q2 earnings of $1.19/share (vs. $1.01 estimate) and sales of $1.059 billion (vs. $1.049 billion estimate). CEO credits strong growth in clinical segment.
data.description: Illumina, Inc. disclosed its second-quarter earnings, surpassing expectations. The company reported $1.19 per share earnings for the quarter, exceeding the anticipated $1.01 per share. Additionally, quarterly sales stood at $1.059 billion, surpassing the predicted $1.049 billion. CEO Jacob Thaysen attributed the success to the strong performance in X consumables and rapid growth in the clinical segment, their largest customer base. In the research realm, Illumina continues to support its customers effectively.

data.title: ZoomInfo Technologies (NASDAQ: GTM) to report $0.19 EPS on 2025-08-04. Past EPS beats resulted in share price drops. Shares up 4.64% in 52-week period. Analysts anticipate positive guidance impacting stock price more than earnings beat or miss.
data.description: ZoomInfo Technologies is set to release its quarterly earnings report on August 4, 2025. Analysts predict an earnings per share (EPS) of $0.19, and investors are hoping for positive guidance for the next quarter. In the past, the company's EPS has beaten estimates, resulting in fluctuating share prices. For example, in Q1 2025, the EPS estimate was 0.22, but the actual EPS was 0.23, leading to a 3.0% price drop. As of July 31, ZoomInfo shares were trading at $10.83, up 4.64% over the last 52 weeks. Analysts stress the importance of considering market sentiments and industry expectations when assessing ZoomInfo Technologies.

data.title: Bruker (BRKR) set to announce earnings on 2025-08-04, estimated EPS of $0.39. Past performance details and market sentiments. Stock at $38.43, down 41.42% in 52-week period. Analysts rate Bruker as Neutral.
data.description: Bruker (NASDAQ: BRKR) is set to release its quarterly earnings on August 4, 2025, with analysts estimating an EPS of $0.39. Investors are optimistic about surpassing estimates and upbeat guidance for the next quarter. In the previous quarter, the company beat EPS by $0.03, resulting in a 0.61% drop in share price the next day. Bruker's recent performance shows fluctuations in EPS and corresponding price changes. As of July 31, shares were trading at $38.43, down 41.42% over the last 52 weeks. Analysts have rated Bruker as Neutral, emphasizing the importance of understanding market sentiments and expectations. Full details are available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Allison Transmission (ALSN) to release Q2 2025 earnings on Aug 4 with expected EPS of $2.21. Previous earnings beat by $0.25, resulting in a 4.13% share price increase. Stock trading at $90.07, up 6.15% in the last year. Analyst sentiment is neutral.
data.description: Allison Transmission (ALSN) will announce its quarterly earnings on August 4, with analysts predicting an EPS of $2.21. Investors are hopeful for positive news surpassing estimates and guidance for the next quarter, knowing stock prices can be influenced by future projections. In the previous release, EPS exceeded by $0.25, rising share prices by 4.13%. Over the last year, ALSN shares have increased by 6.15%. Analysts give a neutral rating, based on 5 reviews. Staying informed on market sentiments is essential for investors. Allison Transmission's stock was trading at $90.07 on July 31.

data.title: Primoris Services (NASDAQ: PRIM) to announce earnings on 2025-08-04 with EPS estimate at $1.06. Stock at $94.17, up 90.71% in 52 weeks. Analysts predict a 0.53% downside with a consensus rating of Outperform. Earnings guidance key for stock prices.
data.description: Primoris Services (NASDAQ: PRIM) is set to report its quarterly earnings on 2025-08-04 with analysts expecting an EPS of $1.06. The market is anticipating news of surpassing estimates and optimistic guidance for the next quarter. In the last quarter, the company exceeded expectations by $0.32, resulting in a 2.94% drop in share price the following day. The stock price performance over previous quarters has seen fluctuations based on earnings reports. As of July 31, shares were trading at $94.17, showing a 90.71% increase over the last 52 weeks. Analysts view Primoris Services favorably, with an 'Outperform' consensus rating and an average one-year price target of $93.67. Peer ratings also suggest positive sentiments within the industry for the company. Understanding market sentiments and guidance is key for investors ahead of the earnings report.

data.title: European Banking Authority releases 2025 stress test results for Societe Generale.
data.description: In the recent data released, it was indicated that the unemployment rate has risen to 6.2%, the highest level in the past five years. The number of individuals who lost their jobs reached 1.5 million, an increase of 800,000 compared to the previous year. Furthermore, the economy experienced a decrease of 3% in the GDP growth rate, marking a significant decline compared to the projected 1.5% growth. This downturn in economic indicators has raised concerns among experts and policymakers regarding the need for immediate intervention to address the rising unemployment and economic contraction.

data.title: Monthly update on the total number of shares and voting rights in Planisware's share capital as of end July 2025.
data.description: Monthly data on the total shares and voting rights comprising the share capital has been released. The report indicates that there are currently X number of shares in circulation, representing the share capital. Furthermore, the total voting rights amount to Y. This information provides stakeholders with insight into the company's structure and decision-making capabilities.

data.title: L’Oréal releases 2025 half-year financial report on Aug 1, 2025, filed with Autorité des marchés financiers.
data.description: On August 1, 2025, L’Oréal disclosed its half-year financial report for the period ending on June 30, 2025. The report has been published for public access and submitted to the Autorité des marchés financiers.

data.title: Avocados from Peru donates 100,000 avocados to San Diego Food Bank on National Avocado Day, benefiting 500,000 servings.
data.description: In San Diego, the Jacobs & Cushman San Diego Food Bank, a leading hunger-relief organization, revealed a substantial contribution on National Avocado Day. Avocados from Peru generously donated 100,000 avocados during the 3rd annual Guac-Off Challenge. This donation will facilitate over 500,000 servings of nutritious food to disadvantaged families in San Diego County. The Food Bank serves these families through a network of 450 nonprofit partners.

data.title: BTC reaches ATH monthly close, Trump spooks markets, altcoins lead fall. SEC launches 'Project Crypto,' most not securities. Coinbase earnings mix, stock down 10%. Tether profits $4.9bn in Q2. ETH treasuries hit $10b. Stablecoins now 18th holder of US treasuries. Visa integrates EURC, PYUSD, USDG. USDC, CCTP V2 coming to Hyperliquid. Mill City Ventures acquires $278m SUI. HK starts stablecoin licensing.
data.description: Bitcoin recently achieved an all-time high monthly close before experiencing a decline in value. Altcoins led the sell-off in the crypto market following a period of mixed earnings. The SEC launched 'Project Crypto' aimed at tokenizing assets, with a focus on assets that are not considered securities according to Atkins. A strategy report indicated a profit of $10 billion despite funding costs. Coinbase reported mixed earnings, resulting in a 10% decrease in its stock value. Coinbase is planning to expand its services to include tokenized Real World Assets (RWAs) and stocks.Additionally, Tether announced profits of $4.9 billion in the second quarter. The treasuries of Ethereum reached $10 billion. The Ethereum Foundation unveiled a 10-year plan to achieve a transaction speed of 10,000 transactions per second. Stablecoins now rank as the 18th largest holder of US treasuries. Jamie Dimon expressed support for stablecoins but not Bitcoin. There have been amendments to the S-1 form for the SOL ETF. Visa has integrated EURC, PYUSD, and USDG into its services. USDC and CCTP V2 are set to be introduced on Hyperliquid by Circle.In other news, Mill City Ventures made a $278 million purchase of SUI. Hong Kong has initiated a stablecoin licensing regime to regulate operations within the territory.
2025 half-year financial report for Planisware now available.
European banks weather a stress test that simulates trade shock.

data.title: Invesco closed-end funds declared dividends, with key dates: ex-date 8/18/2025, payable date 8/29/2025.
data.description: On August 1, 2025, the Board of Trustees for the Invesco closed-end funds announced dividends for their shareholders. The dividends are set to be paid on August 29, 2025, for those holding shares as of the record date, which is also August 18, 2025. The reinvest date is August 29, 2025, and the ex-date is set for August 18, 2025. Shareholders of the mentioned closed-end management investment company can expect monthly payouts as per the schedule provided.

data.title: Cineverse partners with Moviefone to bring back phone line, fans can call 1-802-377-FILM to hear Peter Dinklage's voice as The Toxic Avenger.
data.description: Popular movie companies have come together to revive the Moviefone phone line, inviting fans to dial 1-802-377-FILM to engage with the latest cinema releases before the highly anticipated August 29 premiere. This initiative signifies the return of a beloved movie resource and is led by Cineverse (Nasdaq: CNVS), a cutting-edge entertainment studio based in Los Angeles.

data.title: PFRPA and Delta Dental team up to enhance dental benefits for retired NFL players & spouses, announced on Aug. 1, 2025.
data.description: A partnership between the Pro Football Retired Players Association (PFRPA) and Delta Dental was revealed today in Arlington, Virginia on August 1, 2025. PFRPA, a renowned national organization dedicated to creating initiatives and benefits for retired NFL players, disclosed the collaboration with Delta Dental, the top dental insurance provider in the country.

data.title: Rantizo sells drone spray ops to invest group, rebrands as American Autonomy, Inc. - Iowa City, Aug. 1, 2025.#AgTech
data.description: Today in Iowa City, Iowa, on August 1, 2025, Rantizo, Inc. revealed the sale of its drone spraying operations division to a dedicated investment group proficient in agricultural technology and aerial application services. This strategic move brings a notable change for Rantizo as it transitions to new ownership.

data.title: Mercury Insurance advises homeowners to prepare for extreme weather as events become more costly nationwide.
data.description: Mercury Insurance is urging homeowners to take preventative measures to safeguard their properties, finances, and well-being as severe weather incidents grow more expensive nationwide. This advice comes amidst heightened concern over escalating climate-related damages.

data.title: MrBeast and Mark Rober launch #TeamWater campaign to raise $40 million, providing clean water to 2 million worldwide.
data.description: Internet personalities Jimmy Donaldson, also known as MrBeast, and Mark Rober have introduced #TeamWater, a project driven by creators to collect $40 million by August 31. The aim is to offer clean water to 2 million individuals across the globe for an extended duration. The campaign was initiated in New York on August 1, 2025.

data.title: ClassLink introduces AppTrack to help education leaders review new edtech requests efficiently, addressing the challenge of managing a high volume of requests.
data.description: In Clifton, New Jersey on August 1, 2025, a prominent company in the education sector, ClassLink, unveiled AppTrack, their latest offering in Identity and Access Management solutions. The introduction of AppTrack comes at a time when the company faces a continuous influx of new application requests throughout the year, surpassing their team's capacity for evaluation. This challenge highlights the necessity for an efficient system to manage the influx of requests.

data.title: The Florida Aquarium unveils The Tide Pool, a 60-ft long 4,000-gallon cold-water touch habitat with 200 marine invertebrates.
data.description: In Tampa, Florida, The Florida Aquarium unveiled The Tide Pool during its grand opening celebration. This new attraction is a 60-foot-long, 4,000-gallon cold-water touch habitat, making it one of the few of its kind on Florida’s west coast. With over 200 marine invertebrates, The Tide Pool offers visitors the opportunity to interact with and explore these creatures, a significant increase from the previous exhibit, No Bone Zone. This new addition provides a unique and educational experience for guests, enhancing the aquarium's offerings.
